feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Transaction Type (RMVCT) Missing in ACDOCA for TRM & REFX data
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need guidance on the following business scenario:

System: SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud)
Modules in Scope: FI, REFX, TRM, Group Reporting
Out of Scope: Group Reporting Data Collection (GRDC)

Requirement:
We are working on cash flow reporting in Group Reporting using subitems. For this, transaction type–level data (field RMVCT) is required in the ACDOCA table for borrowing, leases, investments, and deposits accounts. The purpose is to automate the cash flow rather updating subitems (transaction types) in Group Reporting manually.

Issue:
Documents posted from TRM and REFX modules are getting recorded in ACDOCA with a blank transaction type field (RMVCT).
As a result, when releasing data from ACDOCA to Group Reporting (using GRPL), the required subitems information is missing.

Ask:
Has anyone encountered a similar issue?Any suggestions on how to ensure that transaction types (RMVCT) are populated for TRM and REFX postings in ACDOCA?
Any other option available to directly get transaction type level information in Group Reporting from ACDOCA for TRM and REFX related data

Thanks,

Ankita

entry.title: problem occurring at the time of using ABAON
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

when doing asset acquisition posting for multiple assets at a time and error occurs. this we have not received before and last month I did a similar posting without this issue. posting to multiple assets is possible as long as you insert maximum of 5 assets at a time at the moment. attached screenshots of the error message

 Error message: "Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 002 not filled"

 

Kindly help us with this.

entry.title: Message number V1544 during VA02 Sales order item rejection
entry.content:
steps 

  1. VA02 -try to reject Sales Order line item 10 and save the Sales order .VA02 – Change sales order for rejecting Sales order 13040343  item 10.
  2. Getting Error message number V1544.
  3. Exit the Sales Order .
  4. Display Purchase Order number 4634012157 item number 2280 already deleted and marked as delivery completed .

Please review and recommend for successfully rejecting the sales order item .

Attached Document from SQ1 100 test system .

entry.title: Requirement to display custom message on Fiori 3 login page (browser compatibility notice)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have a requirement to display a custom message on the SAP Fiori Launchpad login page (Fiori 3 – /UI2/CL_FIORI3_LOGIN).

We want to show the following message on the login page (above username/password fields):

"SAP FIORI is best compatible with Microsoft Edge Browser"

Regards,
Shilpa.

entry.title: 今月取得し前月稼働の資産の償却費について
entry.content: 今月取得し前月稼働の資産の償却費について償却キーの償却開始年月を今月から先月に変更しても先月の償却費が今月の償却費に上乗せされない。

entry.title: generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h
entry.content: Can we generate a Z-Transaction for End-Users, using se16h , joining two table ACDOCA and CATSDB

entry.title: SQLMD: Cross Node Joins Analysis
entry.content:
When executing SQLMD for Cross Node Join analysis, the program needs an input file containing Tables and Nodes. 

How to generate this file using the data from HANA DB? Wherever I check in System tables/views, this field with Node information is marked as Internal Use only and always return empty result.

So, how to generate the file with Table & Node information required to execute SQLMD?

Thanks

entry.title: Revaluation values for production order
entry.content:
Hello,

The revaluation values posting in the FI document are on 2 lines for each production order: first line has Local Currency and second line has Group Currency values.  For that, KSII and CON2 are used to have the revaluation posting.

Do you know why?

entry.title: Additional “Attributes” button is displayed in CJ8VH variant selection screen after upgrade
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We found a screen difference in transaction CJ8VH between the pre-upgrade and post-upgrade environments.

In transaction CJ8VH, when opening the selection variant screen for variant 2025TEST, an additional “Attributes” button with an edit icon is displayed in the application toolbar in the upgraded environment.

  • Pre-upgrade environment: R4M
  • Post-upgrade environment: R3M
  •

entry.title: the way of cerate index
entry.content: 我们想给acdocp新建一个索引，是否直接在hana studio中执行：1、添加索引：CREATE INDEX SAPHANADB.ACDOCP~AUFNR ON SAPHANADB.ACDOCP (MANDT, AUFNR);  即可？

entry.title: Issue with Inbound Mail Processing in SAP
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are facing an issue related to inbound mail processing in our SAP system.

We have already checked the following points:

  • SCOT configuration
  • SMICM service status
  • SICF service activation
  • User creation in SU01 with user type “System”
  • Network connectivity between SAP and mail server

Earlier, we were facing issues with outgoing mails as well; however, the outbound mail processing is now working properly. Despite all checks being completed successfully and no network issues being observed, inbound mails are still not being processed in SAP.

Request you to please help us identify the root cause and suggest the required solution.

Please let us know if any additional logs, traces, or configuration details are required from our end.

Regards,
Chetan Chavan

entry.title: Fields in tableTCJ04
entry.content: table TCJ04 (containing the person responsible of WBE, under PS module) has field BLOCKED but it not possible to manage this field by customizing or by some user activity. My question is: "how this field works in the system"?

entry.title: F2173 “Add Time Confirmation” requires Personnel Number while IW41 does not – Standard behavior?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am currently testing the fiori App F2173 – Maintenance Orders and Operations on an SAP S/4HANA 2025 FPS01 on-premise system. I found a behavior difference between the Fiori app and the classic GUI transactions regarding time confirmations. When I create a time confirmation from GUI (IW41), works correctly even if no personnel number is specified. From Fiori App F2173, using "Time Confirmations" --> "Add Time Confirmation", the system behaves differently:

  • If I specify a Personnel Number → confirmation is posted successfully
  • If I leave Personnel Number empty → error IW803 is raised: 

Observations:

- The maintenance order does NOT use the phase model

My question is this: 

 

  • expected standard behavior of F2173?
  • a known restriction/design difference versus IW41?
  • or potentially a bug/configuration issue?

Any clarification, SAP Notes, or design documentation references would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: One Joint Venture, Multiple Equity Groups in JVA
entry.content: Is it a good practice to have a configuration where a joint venture in JVA can have multiple equity groups?

entry.title: How do the Kanban container statuses change dynamically from Green to Red as stock Drops
entry.content:
How do the Kanban container statuses change dynamically (e.g., transitioning automatically from "Full" to "Empty") based on these quantity drops?

When my Stock level come down that Bin Qty, Automatic trigger should be done by system. Will Sequence Status helps. Do we have standard Config  in system ?

#Kanban Automatic Trigger

entry.title: Stock transfer material aging report
entry.content: While Sending material using Stock transfer , sending plant GRN  date to be capture in same aging at receiving plant.

entry.title: Title: Residual Delivered Value Remains in PO History After Complete GR Reversal
entry.content:
Issue Description:

We have reversed all Goods Receipt (GR) postings for PO# 6380002240 using movement type 102. After the reversal, the net GR quantity and GR value are showing as zero in the Purchase Order history.

However, a residual delivered value of 117.30 USD is still displayed in the PO history, despite the complete reversal of all GR transactions.

 

Business Requirement:

The business would like to understand whether it is possible to completely reverse the GR and clear the delivered value from the PO history without reversing the Invoice Receipt document.

 

System Observations:

* Purchase Order: 6380002240

* All GR documents have been reversed using movement type 102.

* Net GR quantity = 0

* Net GR value = 0

* Residual delivered value displayed in PO history = 117.30 USD

* Invoice Receipt document is still active.

* PO involves multiple currencies:

  * PO/GR Currency: USD

  * Invoice/Local Currency: CAD

Analysis Performed:

entry.title: Is it possible to select specific G/L accounts in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I would like to confirm whether SAP S/4HANA Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation provides any standard option to select specific G/L accounts for valuation execution.

Our requirement is to apply a different exchange rate logic / treatment for only a few specific G/L accounts, while the rest of the foreign currency valuation should follow the normal process.

From our review so far, in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation we could only identify selection parameters such as:

  • Company Code
  • Ledger
  • Valuation Area / Rule (depending on configuration)

However, we could not find any standard option to explicitly select individual G/L accounts in the valuation run.

We also noticed that some references in SAP documentation / community discussions seem to relate to classic Foreign Currency Valuation, not necessarily Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation.

So our questions are:

  1. Is there any standard functionality in Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation to restrict or select specific G/L accounts for a valuation run?
  2. If not, is there any configuration-based workaround (for example via valuation rules, account determination, semantic tags, or separate setup) to achieve different treatment for selected G/L accounts?
  3. Has anyone handled a similar business requirement where only a subset of G/L accounts needed different exchange rate treatment in Advanced FCV?

System context:

  • SAP S/4HANA
  • Using Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
  • Requirement is for selected G/L accounts to have different valuation treatment than the rest

Any clarification or references to SAP documentation / notes would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: シスログメッセージに「プロファイルパラメータの値にエラーがあります」と表示される件について
entry.content:
お世話になります。S/4 HANA 2025 FPS01環境でSAPシステムを構築中です。
SAPインスタンス起動時に下記エラーメッセージがSM21のシスログに出力されます。
対処方法についてご教授いただけますでしょうか。

2026/5/31    19:21:17    s4hcin21d_SD1_00    DP    0                Q30    プロファイルパラメータの値にエラーがあります dbms/type
2026/5/31    19:21:17    s4hcin21d_SD1_00    DP    0                Q31    > 値: Parameter READONLY m

entry.title: Asset Year change
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During the Asset year change system is throwing the program error as attached in the screenshot. Kindly check and advice correct program to change the Asset year.

Thanks & Regards,

Praveen kumar Y
